about.title: About Lorrayne Mattos
about.intro: Lorrayne Mattos is a biomedical aesthetics professional based in Uberlandia - MG, focused on facial care and eye area harmonization with a natural-result approach.
story: Her positioning combines technique, individualized evaluation, and a careful client journey from the first conversation to the final result.
The website is being prepared to communicate procedures, course offerings, and trust signals with the same clarity used in the in-person experience.
